articles.title: Bournemouth 2-2 Leeds: Farke hails ‘priceless’ point as Iraola fumes at offside decisions
articles.description: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke hailed a "priceless" point as they twice fought back from a goal down to draw 2-2 at Bournemouth.

articles.title: Two down, one to go - who will join Burnley & Wolves?
articles.description: With Wolves and Burnley now relegated, BBC Sport looks at which side is most likely to join them in the Championship next season.

articles.title: Guardiola adamant Man City have to win all their games
articles.description: Pep Guardiola believes Manchester City will need to win all their remaining games to claim the Premier League title after moving top on Wednesday with a 1-0 win over Burnley.

articles.title: The Debrief: Man City go top and Rosenior sacked
articles.description: Alistair Bruce-Ball and the panel react to City going top and Rosenior leaving Chelsea.

articles.title: Pep Guardiola insists Man City are ready to seize 'big opportunity' after going top - but admits he may be forced into FA Cup semi-final changes
articles.description: JACK GAUGHAN: City face Southampton in Saturday's semi-final, with a domestic Treble still on the line after going top of the Premier League by beating Burnley.

articles.title: Will Parker stay at Burnley after relegation?

articles.description: A difficult night at Camp Nou for the Catalans.

articles.title: Lewandowski urged to ‘behave like a man’ and leave Barcelona by Poland legend Tomaszewski
articles.description: Amid uncertainty surrounding his future at Barcelona, Robert Lewandowski received strong criticism from Poland legend Jan Tomaszewski. For months, Robert Lewandowski has been the subject of rumors and speculation, as his future at Barcelona remains unclear be…

articles.title: Yamal scores but injured as Barcelona beat Celta to restore La Liga lead
articles.description: Barcelona edge closer to sealing their La Liga title defence with win against Champions League-chasing Celta Vigo.

articles.title: European round-up: Kane keeps Bayern on course for treble
articles.description: Bayern Munich remain in the hunt for a treble after beating Bayer Leverkusen 2-0 in the DFB-Pokal semi-finals.

articles.title: Kane nets another as Bayern reach German Cup final
articles.description: Bayern Munich turbo-charged their treble pursuit by reaching their first German Cup final since 2020 following a 2-0 win at Bayer Leverkusen on Wednesday. Top scorer Harry Kane was on target yet again, three days after Bayern retained the Bundesliga title and…

articles.title: Kane and Diaz send Bayern past Leverkusen into German Cup final
articles.description: Harry Kane and Luis Diaz scored as Bayern Munich won 2-0 at Bayer Leverkusen on Wednesday to reach the German Cup final for the first time since 2020. The Bavarian giants have won a record 20 German Cups but had not reached the showpiece in Berlin for six yea…

articles.title: Bayern beat Leverkusen 2-0 to reach first German Cup final in six years
articles.description: LEVERKUSEN, Germany, April 22 : Treble-chasing Bayern Munich battled past hosts Bayer Leverkusen 2-0 on Wednesday with goals from Harry Kane and Luis Diaz to reach the German Cup final for the first time in six years.The hosts were no match for the Bavarians,…

articles.title: PSG bounces back to open 4-point lead in Ligue 1 with 4 rounds remaining
articles.description: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia scored twice as Paris Saint-Germain recovered from its Ligue 1 loss to Lyon with a 3-0 victory over relegation-threatened Nantes on Wednesday. PSG’s home win – in a game postponed from mid-March to allow the team to better prepare for it…

articles.title: Inside the Leicester City fire sale: Foxes set for huge summer clear-out as finance expert reveals the devastating impact relegation to League One will have on club coffers
articles.description: Parachute payments have already been sold to a lender, broadcast revenue will fall 98 per cent compared to two years ago and other income streams will take a seismic hit.

articles.title: Leicester City relegated to third tier just five years after FA Cup glory
articles.description: Ten years after a fairytale Premier League title and five years since winning the FA Cup, Leicester City is destined for the third tier of English football.
